memberdef.argsstring: (const Vector3 &p, const double radius, const Vector3 &v, const Vector3 &e)
memberdef.name: check_linesegment

detaileddescription.para: Check whether a point p is within distance radius of the line segment whose first vertex is described by v and second vertex by v-e

memberdef.argsstring: (const aiScene *scene, aiNode *node, const geo::Pose3D &parent_pose, double scale_x, double scale_y, double scale_z, bool transform, geo::Mesh *mesh)
memberdef.name: constructMesh

briefdescription.para: converting geo::TraingleI (Indices of a triangle in a vector of points) to shape_msgs::MeshTriangle
converts a geo::Mesh to shape_msgs::Mesh Both use a very similar structure based on points and triangles.

memberdef.argsstring: (geo::Shape &shape, double radius, double height, unsigned int num_corners=20)
memberdef.name: createCylinder
